title: Ice Crystal PvP Arena
description: A frozen Crystal PvP arena map built for intense CPvP battles, practice fights, and competitive duels with a stunning icy atmosphere.
body:
Step into Ice Arena — a cold and dangerous battlefield designed specially for intense Crystal PvP combat! Built with a stunning frozen aesthetic, this map combines competitive gameplay with a clean icy atmosphere to create the perfect environment for CPvP battles, practice sessions, and duels.

The arena features balanced fighting spaces, smooth movement paths, and an optimized layout made for fast-paced crystal combat. Whether you're improving your crystal placements, practicing anchor plays, or fighting skilled opponents, Ice Arena delivers an exciting and immersive PvP experience from start to finish.

Fight through the frozen battlefield, master your timing, and become the king of the ice!

Features
❄️ Beautiful frozen/ice-themed arena
💎 Designed specially for Crystal PvP
⚔️ Great for duels, practice, and competitive fights
🚀 Smooth and optimized gameplay experience
🏟️ Detailed custom-built map design
